warnings: ABAP session variables like $session.user, $session.client may not have direct SQL equivalents
ABAP-specific functions like unit_conversion, dats_days_between, utcl_current may not exist in Snowflake
Parameter syntax $parameters.p_smax translated to :p_smax but may need adjustment for Snowflake
Some ABAP built-in functions may not have exact Snowflake equivalents
assumptions: Parameters are passed as bind variables using :parameter_name syntax
ABAP session variables mapped to closest SQL equivalents where possible
ABAP-specific date/time functions mapped to standard SQL date functions
ABAP typed literals converted to standard SQL literals
Projection references resolved to column aliases within same SELECT
conversion_notes: Converted ABAP CDS DEFINE VIEW to CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
Translated ABAP CASE expressions to SQL CASE WHEN...THEN...ELSE...END
Converted ABAP built-in functions to closest Snowflake equivalents
Removed ABAP-specific syntax like 'key' keyword and typed literals prefixes
